elements.name: AI Agent
elements.description: Cursor agent that seeds and updates the architecture model from repository evidence.

notes.summary: Cursor agent invoked by Arch4: Create/Update Architecture Model to seed or maintain workspace.dsl and entity metadata from repository evidence.

elements.name: Arch4
elements.description: Cursor plugin for generating, validating, indexing, and viewing enriched C4 architecture documentation.
openQuestions: Internal npm packages are modeled as containers because this monorepo does not evidence separate deployable runtime services.

notes.summary: Cursor plugin that keeps C4 architecture documentation next to code through Structurizr DSL source, enriched metadata, rendered views, and an interactive map.
decisions: Model monorepo packages as C4 containers when no stronger runtime boundary is evidenced in repository manifests or deployment files.

recentCommits.author: Paul Stoeckle
recentCommits.subject: Use reinstall command in README quick start

elements.name: Arch4 CLI
elements.description: Initializes, validates, renders, indexes, and serves architecture context for a repository.

notes.summary: Node CLI that initializes Arch4 workspaces and runs validate, render, index, context, and doctor commands against repository-local architecture artifacts.

elements.name: CLI Commands
elements.description: Dispatches init, validate, render, index, context, and doctor commands.

notes.summary: Command dispatcher for init, validate, render, index, context, and doctor workflows.

elements.name: Context Lookup
elements.description: Maps changed files to architecture elements and renders compact context markdown.

notes.summary: Maps changed repository files to architecture elements and renders compact markdown context for agents and tooling.

elements.name: Architecture Indexer
elements.description: Builds architecture-index.json, context files, and git-enriched element metadata.

notes.summary: Builds architecture-index.json, per-entity context markdown, and git-enriched contributor metadata from rendered views and entity paths.

elements.name: Runtime Resolver
elements.description: Locates bundled or configured Java and Structurizr CLI executables.

notes.summary: Resolves bundled or configured Java and Structurizr CLI paths and reports runtime diagnostics for doctor and render commands.

elements.name: Arch4 Core
elements.description: Shared contracts, workspace layout helpers, and JSON validation utilities.

notes.summary: Shared TypeScript contracts and helpers for Arch4 workspace layout, diagram specs, diagnostics, and JSON validation.

elements.name: Cursor Extension
elements.description: Hosts Arch4 commands, explorer tree, webview map, and workspace artifact lifecycle.

notes.summary: Cursor extension that exposes Arch4 commands, explorer tree, webview map, workspace artifact installation, and CLI orchestration.

elements.name: Workspace Artifacts
elements.description: Installs Arch4-owned Cursor helpers and reads rendered build artifacts.

notes.summary: Installs Arch4-owned Cursor helpers, reads rendered build artifacts, and removes confirmed workspace artifacts on user request.

elements.name: Extension Host
elements.description: Registers commands, tree view, file watchers, and CLI orchestration.

notes.summary: Extension activation entry point that registers commands, tree provider, artifact watchers, layout persistence, and CLI execution.

elements.name: Architecture Map Webview
elements.description: Embeds the interactive C4 map and layout controls in Cursor.

notes.summary: Bundled webview shell that embeds the Arch4 viewer bundle and exchanges layout and payload messages with the extension host.

elements.name: Diagram Layout Engine
elements.description: Computes dagre-based node and boundary layout for diagram specs.

notes.summary: Dagre-based layout engine that positions diagram nodes and boundaries for rendered Arch4 views.

elements.name: Structurizr Renderer
elements.description: Exports Structurizr workspace JSON and converts it into Arch4 diagram specs.

notes.summary: Renderer pipeline that exports Structurizr workspace JSON, normalizes it into diagram specs, applies layout, and writes view output.

elements.name: Structurizr Export
elements.description: Runs Structurizr validate and export against workspace.dsl.

notes.summary: Runs Structurizr validate and export subprocesses against workspace.dsl using the bundled Java and Structurizr CLI.

elements.name: Diagram Layout Adapter
elements.description: Applies Arch4 layout direction and manual node positions to diagram specs.

notes.summary: Applies Arch4 layout direction and manual node positions to normalized diagram specs before output is written.

elements.name: Workspace Normalizer
elements.description: Converts Structurizr export JSON into diagram nodes, edges, and boundaries.

notes.summary: Transforms Structurizr export JSON into Arch4 diagram nodes, edges, boundaries, and diagnostics.

elements.name: View Output Writer
elements.description: Atomically replaces rendered view JSON under .arch4/architecture/build/views/.

notes.summary: Atomically replaces rendered view JSON files under .arch4/architecture/build/views/ after a successful render.

elements.name: Architecture Viewer
elements.description: React map UI for exploring rendered diagrams with element details and navigation.

notes.summary: React and React Flow viewer that renders diagram specs with navigation, element details, and layout controls.

elements.name: Cursor
elements.description: Editor host for the Arch4 extension, commands, webview map, and AI-assisted workflows.

notes.summary: Editor platform that hosts the Arch4 extension, command palette workflow, explorer tree, webview map, and AI prompt deeplinks.

elements.name: Developer
elements.description: Maintains repository code and Arch4 architecture documentation in Cursor.

notes.summary: Primary human actor who edits repository code and uses Arch4 inside Cursor to maintain and explore C4 documentation.

elements.name: Git
elements.description: Source-control history used to enrich architecture index metadata.

notes.summary: Source-control history consulted during indexing to attach contributors and recent commits to mapped architecture elements.

elements.name: Java Runtime
elements.description: Pinned JVM bundled with Arch4 for Structurizr CLI execution.

notes.summary: Pinned JVM bundled per platform so Structurizr CLI can run without relying on a system Java install.

elements.name: Maintainer
elements.description: Builds, packages, and publishes the Arch4 Cursor extension.

notes.summary: Maintains release tooling, OpenVSX publication, and support processes for the Arch4 extension.

elements.name: OpenVSX
elements.description: Marketplace where Arch4 extension packages are published for Cursor.

notes.summary: Distribution channel for platform-specific Arch4 VSIX packages consumed by Cursor.

elements.name: Structurizr CLI
elements.description: Validates workspace.dsl and exports workspace JSON for Arch4 rendering.

notes.summary: External Structurizr CLI bundled with Arch4 to validate workspace.dsl and export workspace JSON before Arch4 performs TypeScript layout and view output.

elements.name: Target Repository
elements.description: Repository workspace where Arch4 stores architecture source and derived artifacts under .arch4/.
openQuestions: Should repository-local .arch4/ state be modeled as an external system, a container, or a data store when Arch4 models its own host repository?

notes.summary: Repository workspace where Arch4 stores architecture source, entity metadata, and derived build artifacts.

Reads and writes architecture artifacts in
Reads rendered views and index from
Invokes validate, render, and diagnostics through
Initializes and writes architecture source in
Writes rendered views and diagnostics to
Reads entity metadata and rendered views from
Installs Arch4-owned helpers and reads build artifacts from

diagnostics.message: Architecture entity developer has no path mapping.
